prompt: Aggregate risks across our 25-project portfolio. Individual project risk registers exist but nobody is looking at how these risks combine at the portfolio level.
assertions: Must normalize risk data from individual project registers into a common taxonomy
Must calculate aggregate portfolio risk exposure beyond simple summation
Must identify risk concentrations where multiple projects share the same risk categories
Must compare aggregate exposure against organizational risk appetite thresholds

prompt: We have 3 projects that all depend on the same cloud migration completing on time, use the same external vendor, and share 2 key architects. Assess the cross-project risk correlation.
assertions: Must identify the shared cloud migration dependency as a correlation risk factor
Must flag the common vendor as a single point of failure across all 3 projects
Must assess the impact of shared architect over-allocation on correlated delivery risk
Must model cascade scenarios showing how one project's failure propagates to others

prompt: Identify systemic risks in our portfolio. We recently had a security breach that impacted 8 projects simultaneously, suggesting our risk management misses portfolio-wide threats.
assertions: Must identify shared infrastructure vulnerabilities as a systemic risk category
Must scan for other single points of failure that could cause similar widespread disruption
Must evaluate organizational resilience and recovery capability for systemic events
Must recommend early warning indicators and systemic risk monitoring mechanisms

prompt: Prepare a portfolio risk report for the quarterly steering committee. The audience is C-level executives who have 15 minutes for the risk section.
assertions: Must produce an executive-level summary suitable for senior leadership consumption
Must quantify risk exposure in financial terms that resonate with C-level executives
Must present top portfolio risks with clear action recommendations for governance decisions
Must include trend analysis showing how portfolio risk posture has evolved over time
